page.title: Dashboard

onboarding.step1Desc: Once a customer is added, you can link sites and contracts to them
onboarding.step2Title: Register a site and link it to a customer
onboarding.step2Desc: After entering site info, you can manage processes, expenses, and receivables at a glance
onboarding.step3Desc: Enter floor area and trades and the AI creates a tiered estimate
onboarding.step4Title: Register a contract to auto-generate payment schedules
onboarding.step4Desc: Set deposits, mid-payments, and final payment dates to track collection
onboarding.step5Title: Add processes and schedules are generated automatically
onboarding.step5Desc: The AI Process Manager builds an optimal schedule based on floor area

meta.title: InteriorCoach | All-in-one SaaS for interior contractors
meta.description: Project management, estimates, contracts, expenses, settlement, and tax — all in one place. Built for interior contractors.
meta.ogDescription: Run your projects, estimates, contracts, expenses, settlement, and tax on a single screen. 14-day free trial, no card required.
